name: Yankee Potato Salad with Dill
recipeIngredient: Fresh Ground Black Pepper -- To Taste
2 Cups Steamed Broccoli Florets, In Bite Size Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a heavy saucepan and add enough water to cover them three-fourths of the way. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and cook until tender but still firm, about 20 minutes. Remove from heat and drain.
3. In a large heat-proof bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, vinegar, mustard, salt, and pepper.
4. Add the hot potatoes to the dressing and mix well, ensuring they are evenly coated.
5. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
6. Stir in the fresh dill.
7. Refrigerate until chilled.
8. Just before serving, toss with the steamed broccoli florets.
